prompt: a high-resolution 3D CT image of a human femur that accurately reflects the internal density variations depicted in the reference image
prompt_refined: Generate a high-resolution, photorealistic 3D CT scan of a human femur. The internal density variations in the generated image must accurately reflect the pattern depicted in image 1, with the red and yellow regions of image 1 corresponding to high-density areas (appearing bright white in the CT scan), and the blue regions corresponding to low-density areas (appearing dark).
objects: bright white areas (corresponding to high density)
